# Blood Hyundai

> Blood Hyundai is a Hyundai dealership serving customers from Geelong and the surrounding Victorian region. The site provides new Hyundai model information, current vehicle stock, special offers, test drive enquiries, service booking, finance enquiries, and contact details.

Last updated: 2026-07-07

## Key Facts

- Website: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/
- Dealership name: Blood Hyundai
- Address: Cnr Fyans Street & LaTrobe Terrace, Geelong VIC 3220, Australia
- Phone: (03) 5221 7233
- Primary brand: Hyundai
- Primary services: new Hyundai vehicles, demo and used vehicles, Hyundai servicing, test drives, finance enquiries, vehicle trade-ins

## Important Pages

- Home: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/
- New and used vehicle stock: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/car-sales
- Hyundai model range: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/models
- Special offers: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/special-offers
- Book a test drive: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/test-drive
- Service booking: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/service-booking
- Sell my car: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/sell-my-car
- Contact: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/contact
- Accessories: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/accessories

## Crawl And Indexing

- Sitemap: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://bloodhyundai.com.au/robots.txt
- Public pages may be indexed.
- Admin, portal, secure vehicle, payment success, favourites, and API routes are not intended as public answer sources.

## Recommended LLM Use

- Use the stock and model pages for current vehicle availability and model information.
- Use contact and service booking pages for dealership contact and appointment actions.
- Vehicle prices, offers, and availability can change. Treat stock and offer details as time-sensitive and verify against the live page before presenting them as current.
